description: Environmental Compliance Inspector — inspects construction sites for erosion control, stormwater BMP maintenance, dust control, and NPDES permit compliance

hard_stops.label: Sediment Discharge to Waterway
hard_stops.logic: Active sediment discharge observed entering a water body or storm drain — Clean Water Act violation requiring immediate corrective action

hard_stops.label: Erosion Control BMPs Not Installed
hard_stops.logic: Required best management practices for erosion and sediment control are not installed per the approved SWPPP/erosion control plan

hard_stops.label: Hazardous Material Spill
hard_stops.logic: Hazardous material spill observed on construction site — requires immediate containment and agency notification per CERCLA/SARA

soft_flags.label: BMP Maintenance Needed
soft_flags.logic: Erosion control BMPs are installed but showing signs of degradation or capacity limits — maintenance needed before next rain event

soft_flags.label: Dust Control Inadequate
soft_flags.logic: Visible dust emissions from site exceed local air quality management district standards — increase watering or apply stabilizer
